cat > /workspace/research/notes.md << 'NOTES'
# Research Notes — Password Manager Evaluation

## Context
- 50-person engineering team, Series-B SaaS company
- Current state: shadow IT (browser, sticky notes, Slack DMs)
- CTO mandate: fix within 90 days
- Need: team-wide standardization

## Candidate Products (to evaluate)
1. 1Password Teams/Business
2. Bitwarden Teams/Business
3. LastPass Enterprise
4. Dashlane Teams/Business
5. Keeper Security

## Key Criteria to Research
- Per-seat pricing (annual)
- SSO integration (Google Workspace, Okta, etc.)
- Audit logging (SOC 2 compliance)
- Admin console UX
- Mobile + desktop coverage
- Developer tool integrations (CLI, CI/CD, browser extensions)
- Security model (zero-knowledge, encryption)
- Security incident history
- Self-hosting option (for Bitwarden)
- Compliance certifications (SOC 2, FedRAMP, HIPAA)

## Research Strategy
- Hit pricing pages directly
- Hit trust/compliance pages
- Check GitHub for open-source projects
- Check security blogs for incident history
- Cross-reference with review sites (G2, Capterra) for feature comparisons
NOTES
echo "Notes initialized"
